description: A modal or widget that captures focus but provides no keyboard way out, trapping keyboard and screen-reader users.
body: Failure mode: a dialog or custom widget moves focus inward but offers no Escape, no reachable close control, and no focus return, so keyboard users are stranded. Detection signals: Tab cycles forever inside the widget; Escape does nothing; focus never returns to the trigger on close; manual keyboard test cannot exit. Do not build focus capture without a deliberate exit and restore path. Safer fallback: trap focus within the open dialog but wire Escape and a focusable close button, restore focus to the invoking element on close, and verify the full open/close cycle by keyboard.
